# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Python runtime as a parent image  # https://hub.docker.com/r/python/ubuntu  
FROM python:3.8-slim    
   
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \     
        NODE_VERSION=14.\*      
        
# Set up the Ubuntu environment  # https://hub.docker.com/_/debian?tab=tags&page=2  
RUN apt-get update &&     sudo apt-get install -yqq $NODE_VERSION npm \    --no-install-recommends;      rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*  # https://github.com/nodesource/distributions#debian8+7
      
WORKDIR /app    
COPY package*.json ./  
RUN npm install        
         
COPY . .   
CMD [ "node", "./bin/www" ]
